issues.detail: The skill does not cover error handling or edge cases for deployment and data operations.

scenarios.name: deploy-and-query-dau
scenarios.rationale: Response A meets all rubric requirements, while Response B omits partitioning, ordering, and uses count(DISTINCT) instead of uniqExact.

scenarios.name: nodejs-insert-and-query-dau
scenarios.rationale: Response B covers most rubric items (import, client setup, insert with format, JSON result, close) but misses parameterized days and uniqExact; Response A lacks format, uniqExact, parameterization, and client close.
